room.caption: [ControlCenterD] Be the guiding hand.
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(9)
if global.gameProgress=960 global.gameProgress=970
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh5MainA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(3) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: stringToShow="Watch out for respawning rocks." signSize=1
